name: George Bush Intercontinental Airport (IAH)
content: The Houston airport is fine. The food is not. I sat down for a burrito that had too much juice packed into it and was wrapped in wax paper. The result was a large puddle on the table by the time I finished eating the burrito, alongside debilitating public humiliation as passersby silently judged me and my burrito puddle of shame. Another time Actually, this was the same night. I was just really hungry., I bought a bowl of ramen. It had Italian button mushrooms in it that were practically raw. The nutritional content of the ramen was fine, and the flavor was passable, but it was still a disheartening experience.
